title: Crispy Delight Chicken
description: A simple recipe for a crispy and savory chicken dish. This recipe is perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Rinse the chicken breast and pat it dry with a paper towel.
Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
Drizzle olive oil on both sides of the chicken.
Sprinkle the crunchy topping on both sides of the chicken.
Sprinkle the delight spice blend on both sides of the chicken.
Grill the chicken for 5-7 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F.
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
